programmes.show_description: Fact-based WWII drama with Nicolas Cage. After delivering atomic weapons eventually used at Hiroshima, the survivors of a sunken US Navy cruiser face five days in shark-infested waters.
Tense Western. In 1876, a bounty hunter travels through the snow-swept lands of Montana and Wyoming to track down his infamous brother for an epic battle that will seal both men's fates.

Ex-lovers fight over the alleged abuse of a beloved cat that was long overdue for a trip to the vet.
After a man's jaw is allegedly broken during a fight at a party, he sues for pain and suffering; the host claims he was drunk, belligerent and aggressive.
A woman sues a dog breeder for return of money she paid for a puppy, vet bills, travel costs and alleged fraud.
A man who owns and manages 44 properties is sued by a tenant for the return of her deposit after he failed to show up for a housing inspection.
The Judge orders a woman to hand over her dog to its co-parent in a contentious custody fight involving dead puppies and alleged emergency neutering.
An RV owner is accused of messing up the festival camp vibe by refusing to pay for his girlfriend's camping fees.
A man accuses a costume designer of delivering a shoddy product; the designer sues for slander and claims he received death threats.

A US woman allegedly drowns in the bathtub, but her husband's story doesn't add up. When his second wife also drowns two years on, police's worst fears are confirmed.
In the US, a missing woman's body is found washed up on the shore of a tidal estuary. CCTV, DNA and a cryptic note lead investigators to her ex-partner.
In May of 2019, Jennifer Farber Dulos dropped off her five children at school, drove to her Connecticut home, and was never seen again.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. The abused wife of a drug dealer seeks help from Trent, who becomes a champion of battered women.

When a UK fisherman is murdered and dumped in the River Thames, forensics link three men to the scene. But evidence lost in the river makes convicting his killers challenging.
